infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HauntQuest Journal uses the camera to capture photos inside the app before you publish them.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HauntQuest Journal accesses your photo library to let you choose media that appears in the app.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HauntQuest Journal uses the microphone to record audio tracks that the app attaches to your creations.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HauntQuest Journal uses your location to display your position on in-app maps and surface nearby points of interest.
